diagnostic_basis: ischemic symptoms with ECG change or troponin rise
agent_use: 用于识别急性冠脉综合征并提示抗血小板抗凝和出血风险复核

diagnostic_basis: exertional ischemic symptoms or known coronary artery disease with objective ischemia
reference_source: AHA/ACC chronic coronary disease guideline; Merck Manual
agent_use: 用于识别慢性冠脉病治疗目标和抗血小板调脂知识

aliases: congestive heart failure|systolic heart failure|diastolic heart failure
diagnostic_basis: typical congestion symptoms plus objective cardiac dysfunction evidence
reference_source: AHA/ACC/HFSA heart failure guideline; Merck Manual
agent_use: 用于识别心衰相关治疗目标和容量管理风险

diagnostic_basis: irregular rhythm with ECG evidence of atrial fibrillation
agent_use: 用于识别抗凝和心率控制相关诊疗知识

diagnostic_basis: persistent elevated blood pressure or documented hypertensive disease
differential_diagnosis: secondary hypertension|pain related blood pressure elevation|white coat hypertension
agent_use: 用于识别降压治疗目标和肾功能电解质复核

diagnostic_basis: murmur or symptoms with echocardiographic valve abnormality
reference_source: AHA/ACC valvular heart disease guideline; Merck Manual
agent_use: 用于识别瓣膜病导致的容量和抗凝相关风险

diagnostic_basis: persistent bacteremia with vegetation or compatible Duke criteria
reference_source: AHA infective endocarditis statement; Merck Manual
agent_use: 用于识别感染性心内膜炎和抗感染抗凝复核场景

diagnostic_basis: acute tearing pain or aneurysm imaging evidence with vascular risk context
reference_source: ACC/AHA aortic disease guideline; Merck Manual
agent_use: 用于识别主动脉急症和抗凝降压风险复核
